parameter.name: citiesPath
parameter.description: Path to an XML file containing a cities dataset, in the same format as the cities.xml shipping with seiscomp.

parameter.name: regionsPath
parameter.description: Path to a GeoJSON or BNA file containing a collection of named polygons.

parameter.name: countriesPath
parameter.description: Path to a GeoJSON or BNA file containing a collection of named polygons describing countries, with the country name in the property Primary_ID.

parameter.name: homeCountry
parameter.description: Country to treat as the home country. If both the epicenter and the point of interest fall in the home country, the special "homeCountry" template strings will be used.

parameter.name: approximate
parameter.description: Message conversion string used for non-reviewed events when both the epicenter and the point of interest fall in the configured home country. Supported placeholders are @poi@, @dist@, and @dir@.

parameter.name: precise
parameter.description: Message conversion string used for reviewed events when both the epicenter and the point of interest fall in the configured home country. Supported placeholders are @poi@, @dist@, and @dir@.

parameter.name: approximate
parameter.description: Message conversion string used for non-reviewed events when the epicenter and the point of interest fall in the same country, but not the home country. Supported placeholders are @poi@, @poi_country@, @dist@, and @dir@.

parameter.name: precise
parameter.description: Message conversion string used for reviewed events when the epicenter and the point of interest fall in the same country, but not the home country. Supported placeholders are @poi@, @poi_country@, @dist@, and @dir@.

parameter.name: approximate
parameter.description: Message conversion string that converts a POI/city into the region name for non-reviewed events when the POI and epicenter fall in different countries. Supported placeholders are @epi_country@, @poi_country@, @dist@, @dir@, and @poi@.

parameter.name: precise
